response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, distributed systems, and technical leadership, he falls significantly short of the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming. His background is primarily in full-stack web development, Node.js, and DLang, rather than the low-level compute technologies and C++ expertise required for this specific platform role.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience with a strong focus on testing, craftsmanship, and system architecture.
Proven track record of technical leadership and mentoring, evidenced by Staff-level roles and running coding workshops.
Solid experience building distributed systems and microservices handling high traffic.
concerns: Severely lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience, with only brief professional usage over two decades ago.
Experience is heavily skewed towards full-stack web development rather than core cloud compute infrastructure.
Lacks deep, production-level experience managing internal cloud compute platforms for downstream engineering.
